methodology: Discovers JSON files under workflowRoot, skips JSON that is not an n8n workflow object with a top-level nodes array, then runs n8n-lint check --json against each selected workflow using the bundled-n8n-package schema source. This benchmark does not execute workflows and does not use live n8n REST validation.
